metrics.name: psi
metrics.definition: Population Stability Index between live and baseline score distributions.

metrics.name: js_divergence
metrics.definition: Jensen-Shannon divergence between live and baseline score distributions.

metrics.name: current_mean_score
metrics.definition: Mean churn score for live scoring window.

metrics.name: current_std_score
metrics.definition: Standard deviation of churn score for live scoring window.

metrics.name: risk_mix.high
metrics.definition: Share of users in high churn-risk bucket.

metrics.name: risk_mix.low
metrics.definition: Share of users in low churn-risk bucket.

metrics.name: predicted_positive_rate_live
metrics.definition: Share of users predicted to reorder in live scoring window.

metrics.name: near_threshold_rate
metrics.definition: Share of users within epsilon of churn threshold.

metrics.name: brier
metrics.definition: Brier score (calibration error) on validation/test splits.

metrics.name: target_rate
metrics.definition: Observed reorder rate in snapshot window.

metrics.name: avg_orders_30d
metrics.definition: Average orders in the last 30 days per user.

metrics.name: avg_revenue_lookback
metrics.definition: Average revenue per user over lookback window.

metrics.name: orders_zscore
metrics.definition: Z-score for rolling order volume anomalies.

metrics.name: retention_rate
metrics.definition: Cohort retention rate by month and period.

metrics.name: revenue_retention_rate
metrics.definition: Cohort revenue retention relative to cohort month 0.
